reason: Direct controlled human study shows increased MDMA exposure, prolonged subjective effects, and altered cardiovascular response.
Bupropion and other CYP2D6 inhibitors increase MDMA exposure by reducing metabolism.
NET modulation alters MDMA cardiostimulant effects via norepinephrine.
Gillman supports severe serotonin toxicity risk when MAOI activity is combined with serotonergic agents.
